name: Trendline Adult Dog Food - BEEF 1kg
description: Trendline Adult Dog Food - Beef , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef protein, brewer's yeast for immune support and Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein .........................................18% Fat .................................................9% Crude Ash .................................... 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ............... 4% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Supports: . Strong bones and teeth. . Robust immune system. . Optimal metabolism and digestion. Key Benefits 18% Beef Protein – fuels lean muscle growth and sustained energy. 9% Healthy Fats – supports skin hydration and a glossy, soft coat. Brewer’s Yeast – promotes a strong immune system and healthy digestion. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – reduce inflammation and maintain joint health. Delicious Beef Flavor – keeps your dog excited for every mealtime. Feeding Guide For adult dogs, feed according to weight and activity level (refer to packaging). Always ensure access to fresh, clean water.
